scene, they convert into a prefab entity
Loots are special prefabs that carry a
defining drop behavior and pickup rules.
Permanently carried by all loot prefabs.
linked to a Loot prefab for scene display.
Virtual item templates must be related with a Loot prefab. If no relation is established, the drop logic will be blocked.
Interaction button appears within range, click to pick up
Automatically triggered when character enters pickup range
Opens interface to select loot. Recommended for multiple items
Loot moves toward character when entering attract range,
auto-pickup triggers upon reaching pickup range
Distance at which Auto-Attract triggers loot movement
Reference filter nodes to determine if conditions are met
Dictionary of virtual items; overwritten when dropped as loot/trophies
Defines the range within which players can collect loots. Supports three basic shapes:
Enter the prefab library editor to view the Loot tab. Click "Advanced Editing" to expand.
In the Entity or Prefab editing interface, open the Component Editing Tab.
Click "Add Common Components" then click "Loot" to add it.
All items in one loot entity
One pick-up per item for all
Sets the loot content before drop
The Loot component only supports configuring one set of Loot template data per component. Combined Drops use the configured Loot prefab appearance.
